name: Family YMCA of Emporia-Greensville
description: Family YMCA of Emporia-Greensville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Emporia, VA. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are not available. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights.
